meta.title: Myanmar Astronaut
meta.description:
I spent two weeks at a children's home in Myanmar where I met Nadi Ang, a young artist who was fascinated when I taught her about space. I ended up creating this fictional piece to help encourage kids to pursue their dreams by empowering themselves with education. 


Film, story and music by TIm Dodd - The Everyday Astronaut
www.everydayastronaut.com
